title: Fix restore BaseNB._check_X without abstractmethod decoration
body: This is a follow-up on #15996 to fix the fact that this method is actually internally used by the other methods of the base class as remarked by @qinhanmin2014: https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/pull/15996#issuecomment-569942569
commits: Fix restore BaseNB._check_X without abstractmethod decoration
